member.name: T:Valaiorp.Tools.Contracts.ICompensatable
member.summary:
Opt-in interface for tools that can undo their own side-effects.
When a tool implements , the TransactionManager calls during rollback instead of only flipping an in-memory status flag. This enables real undo for file writes, API calls, database inserts, etc.
Contract: • receives the same outputs the tool produced so it can identify exactly what was created/changed (e.g., a file path, a record ID). • The method MUST be idempotent — it may be called more than once on the same outputs. • If compensation itself fails, throw; the caller will surface the error.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Tools.Helpers.ToolParameters.ParsePipeInput(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Splits a pipe-delimited "input" parameter into parts (max 3 so the last segment may itself contain pipes). Protocol: action|param1|param2 e.g. "SetText|#username|admin"

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Tools.Registries.ToolRegistry.FormatForSystemPrompt
member.summary:
Returns a formatted list of all registered tools suitable for inclusion in an LLM system prompt. Agent authors call this to tell the LLM which tools are available without re-implementing tool discovery themselves.
Format per tool: - {id}: {description}

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Tools.Resolvers.ToolResolver.ExecuteToolAsync(System.String,Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.AgentMessage,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a tool from inside an agent's RunAsync without requiring an IExecutionContext. Builds a minimal context from the AgentMessage so agent authors don't have to.
